name: ai.coasty/mcp
title: Coasty
description: Full computer use over MCP — desktop, browser, terminal, files, and scheduled jobs from Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, or VS Code. Sandbox VMs for free dev, real AWS/Azure infra for production, 4-mode approval system.

environmentVariables.name: COASTY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Coasty API key. Free sandbox keys (sk-coasty-test-*) start at https://coasty.ai/developers — they return mock VMs in <50ms with zero billing. Live keys (sk-coasty-live-*) provision real AWS/Azure VMs.

environmentVariables.name: COASTY_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (only needed for self-hosted Coasty deployments).

environmentVariables.name: COASTY_MCP_DEBUG
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' for verbose stderr logging (API key always redacted).

ai.coasty/publisher-provided.tagline: The only MCP server that gives Claude full computer access — desktop, browser, terminal, files, schedules — on a cloud VM or your local machine.

quality_signals.schema_portability: every tool's JSON schema is self-contained (no external $ref, no top-level oneOf/anyOf), enforced in CI

differentiators: ONLY MCP server with desktop + browser + terminal + files + schedules in one package
Local-execution path via Electron — your data never leaves your machine
Sandbox keys (sk-coasty-test-*) — instant mock VMs, zero billing, real wire format
HMAC-SHA256 webhook triggers (Stripe-style) for external schedule fires
Idempotency-Key on every POST tool (24h replay safety)
All scopes documented + enforced (machines:write, terminal:exec, browser:execute, etc.)
use_cases: Daily 9 a.m. email-summary jobs that summarize Gmail and post to Slack
Form-fill automation across legacy desktop apps that aren't web-accessible
Browser test runners that need real Chrome on a real desktop
Cron-fired LLM workflows triggered by Stripe / Linear / custom webhooks
Lead-qualification pipelines that read CRMs and update spreadsheets
